description: A finding naming a kinetics record (7777) that is NOT linked to the submission. Anti-fan-out refuses it: it is kept as a diagnostic with a mapping warning, becomes no record summary, and produces no task.

audit_event_details_json.label: warning
audit_event_details_json.summary: A finding about a record not linked to this submission.

findings.message: Rate expression looks off for kinetics record 7777, which is not part of this submission.
